locator.quote: monotone decrease across generations on BOTH arms

text: Success is a monotone decrease across generations on BOTH arms — the head learns from the BCE auxiliary even with the gate disabled.

locator.quote: the bottleneck is even deeper than feature representation

text: If BCE is still flat after phase 15, the bottleneck is even deeper than feature representation (labels weak or an upstream feature bug) - triggering a diagnostic plan, not phase 16.
